name: HRQ_SUB_QUESTIONS_VL
query: SELECT B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, B.SUB_QUESTION_ID, B.QSTN_VERSION_NUM, B.QUESTION_ID, L.TEXT, B.CORRECT_ANSWER_ID, B.CORRECT_RTG_LVL_ID, B.MODULE_ID, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM HRQ_SUB_QUESTIONS_B B, HRQ_SUB_QUESTIONS_TL L WHERE B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = L.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID AND B.SUB_QUESTION_ID = L.SUB_QUESTION_ID AND L.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
